payload.answer: I can’t remember everything about AI as a durable personal memory. Please provide specific information you want saved, such as your AI interests, preferences, projects, or learning goals.

entity_resolution.reason: The request is too broad and does not contain a specific durable personal fact, preference, relationship, or user-specific instruction to remember.

details: No memory was created because the request was overly broad and not user-specific.

repair_options: Remember that I am interested in AI safety.
Remember that I am learning about machine learning.
Remember that I prefer concise explanations of AI topics.
Remember that I am working on an AI-related project called <project name>.
